data.title: Dow slips amid Iran, tariff news; Nvidia, Tesla bounce back; Ross soars. Dow, Nasdaq rally as Trump nominates Powell's replacement.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to updates regarding Iran and tariffs. Amidst this, Nvidia's stock and Tesla recovered from their recent downturns. The stock market today saw a rally with both the Dow and Nasdaq performing well. This came as President Trump nominated a replacement for Fed Chief Powell. Additionally, Ross's stock soared during this trading period.

data.title: GPT-5.2 Pro by OpenAI aids physicists in solving quantum gravity with nonzero graviton amplitudes. Extends gluon findings to Einstein, amazing breakthrough.
data.description: Researchers utilized OpenAI's GPT-5.2 Pro to achieve breakthroughs in deriving nonzero graviton amplitudes in quantum gravity, expanding on previous gluon findings to incorporate Einstein's theory. This advancement signifies a significant step forward in the field, demonstrating the potential of artificial intelligence in aiding scientific exploration.

data.title: Michael L. Parks, MD, FAAOS named first vice president of AAOS, serving second year of four-year leadership term.
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 4, 2026, it was revealed that Dr. Michael L. Parks, an orthopaedic surgeon from New York, has been appointed as the first vice president of the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (AAOS). This appointment is part of a four-year leadership program, with Dr. Parks now serving in his second year in this role. Dr. Parks, who is also a Fellow of the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (FAAOS), brings his expertise and experience to this prestigious position within the organization.

data.title: University of Utah partners with USPTO to open community engagement office in Research Park. Salt Lake City, March 4, 2026.
data.description: A new community engagement office was recently opened in Research Park, as federal patent officials marked the occasion with celebration. On March 4, 2026, in Salt Lake City, the University of Utah finalized an agreement with the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) to establish this office. The partnership aims to foster collaboration and innovation within the community.

data.title: HAI Group renames Housing Training Institute in March 2026 to enhance multifamily housing education. Established in 1994.
data.description: Founded in 1994, the training division of an insurance company is showcasing the development of education in multifamily housing. HAI Group®, a prominent property-casualty insurance provider focusing on public and affordable housing, is leading the nation. The organization is based in Cheshire, Conn., and the news was released on March 4, 2026, via PRNewswire.
